signup.title: Create account
signup.description: Fill in the details to get started.
signup.have_account: Already have an account? Sign in

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in with your email and password.
login.no_account: Don't have an account? Sign up
login.confirmed_notice: Your account was confirmed. Sign in with your email and password.

forgot.title: Recover password
forgot.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a code to reset it.

verify.signup_description: Enter the 8-digit code we sent to {email}.
verify.recovery_description: Enter the 8-digit code we sent to {email}.
verify.no_email_body: Start over so we can send you a new code.

resend.sent_notice: We've sent you a new code.

reset.title: New password
reset.description: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.success_body: Your password was changed. Sign in with the new one.
reset.invalid_link: This recovery session is invalid or has expired. Request a new code.

errors.email_not_confirmed: Confirm your email before signing in.
errors.email_not_confirmed_with_resend: Your account is not confirmed yet. Resend the code and complete confirmation.
errors.user_already_exists: An account with that email already exists.
errors.same_password: The new password must be different from the current one.
errors.otp_expired: The code expired. Request a new one.
errors.over_email_send_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes before trying again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

validation.password_letter: Must include at least one letter.
validation.password_number: Must include at least one number.
validation.otp_format: The code must be exactly 8 digits.

dashboard.title: Home

upcoming.title: What's coming
upcoming.subtitle: Next 2 weeks
upcoming.empty: No upcoming transactions in the next 14 days.

month.title: Month balance
month.error: We couldn't load this month's balance.

cards.title: Cards
cards.empty_title: You haven't added any cards yet

dashboard.hero_error: We couldn't load your available balance.

welcome_card.title: Record your first transaction
welcome_card.description: Once you record your first income or expense, you'll see here how much you have, what's coming, and how the month is going.

show_cents.label: Show cents
show_cents.description: Show decimals on peso amounts (e.g. $333.34 instead of $333).

categories.label: Categories
categories.description: Manage your income and expense categories.

confirmations.delete_category: Delete this category? This action cannot be undone.

errors.duplicate: A category with that name already exists.
errors.duplicate_subcategory: A subcategory with that name already exists in this category.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to Grana
welcome.description: We'll ask you a couple of questions so the app fits you. It takes less than a minute.

profile.title: To set up your Grana, tell us a bit about you
profile.mode_question: What are you looking for in Grana?
profile.mode_simple_description: See my available balance and where my money goes.
profile.mode_detailed_description: See my available balance, where my money goes, and which accounts it's in.
profile.bank_question: Do you have a bank account?

initialBalance.title: How much money do you have today?
initialBalance.description_novato: Just so you start with a real available balance. You can adjust it later with any transaction. If you have no money, enter 0.
initialBalance.description_experto: Enter how much you have available in each place. Anything you leave blank starts at zero. The peso amount is required (can be 0).

done.title: Done, your Grana is set up
done.next_step_with_data: Now you can start recording transactions as you go through your day.
done.next_step_skip: Whenever you want, record your first transaction from the dashboard.

errors.mode_required: Pick the option that fits you best to continue.
errors.institution_required: Pick your bank to create the account.
errors.account_name_required: Set a name for your account.
errors.primary_ars_required: Enter how much money you have in pesos today (can be 0).
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

accounts.title: Accounts

confirmations.archive_body: The account will become inactive. You can reactivate it at any time.
confirmations.delete_body_no_transactions: This account has no transactions. Delete it? This action cannot be undone.

errors.duplicate: An account with that name already exists.
errors.institution_required: Select an institution for bank accounts.
errors.institution_forbidden: Cash accounts do not have an institution.
errors.delete_has_transactions: This account has transactions. Archive it to preserve the history.
errors.deactivate_non_zero_balance: Cannot deactivate a currency with a non-zero balance.
errors.deactivate_last_currency: At least one currency must remain active.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

empty.title: No accounts yet
empty.description: Create your first account to start recording your transactions.

accounts.movements_empty: No transactions on this account yet.

readonly.initialBalance: Opening balance cannot be modified. Record an adjustment once the transactions module is available.

new.title: New credit card
new.subtitle_novato: We only need the closing date of the next statement.
new.subtitle_full: Enter your card details and the current cycle dates.

labels.credit_limit_helper: The limit applies in pesos. Dollar purchases convert at the day's FX rate.
labels.name: Name
labels.novato_close_helper: Take it from the last statement your bank sent you. The app will generate the following statements automatically.
labels.amount_to_pay_helper: Pre-filled with the total outstanding. You can edit it.
labels.next_period_helper: Confirm the next cycle dates (suggested from your history).

list.carousel_empty: You don't have any credit cards yet.

limit_summary.empty_prompt: Add a limit to see how much you have left.

detail.ready_description: Record the first purchase to start seeing how each statement is going.

archived_banner.title: Card archived
archived_banner.description: Historical transactions are preserved but you cannot record new purchases.

deactivate_block.title: Cannot archive
deactivate_block.description: This card has pending purchases. Pay the statement before archiving.

payment.title: Pay statement
payment.usd_note_description: USD purchases are shown for reference. The ARS amount to pay already includes the conversion at the FX rate used on each purchase.
payment.warning: Once confirmed, the payment cannot be reverted. If you recorded a wrong amount or account, fix it with a balance adjustment.

edit_dates.info_extending: The next statement will now start on {newStart} (previously {oldStart}). Purchases of the next statement dated up to {newClose} will move to this one.
edit_dates.info_shrinking: The next statement will now start on {newStart} (previously {oldStart}). Purchases of this statement dated after {newClose} will move to the next one.
edit_dates.error_next_paid: You can't move this date: the next statement is already paid.

confirmations.delete_body: This card has no transactions. Delete it? This action cannot be undone.

errors.duplicate: A card with that name already exists.
errors.limit_invalid: Limit must be greater than zero.
errors.due_after_close: Due date must be after the closing date.
errors.next_close_after_current: Next closing date must be after the current closing date.
errors.next_due_after_close: Next due date must be after the closing date.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.description: Chronological history of income, expenses, transfers, adjustments, and card purchases.
transactions.installment_recalc_hint: Changing the amount recalculates the {count} installments (the rest goes into the first one).

category_suggestion.hint: Next time you log "{description}" we'll suggest "{category}".

installments_options.ars_only_hint: Installments are only available in pesos.
installments_options.usd_rate_warning: You'll need to enter the day's FX rate when confirming each month.

errors.amount_positive: Amount must be greater than zero.
errors.currency_inactive: The selected currency is not active on this account.
errors.currency_inactive_destination: The selected currency is not active on the destination account.
errors.destination_same_as_source: Destination account cannot be the same as the source account.
errors.no_other_accounts: There are no other active accounts to transfer to.
errors.no_shared_currencies: The two accounts share no common currencies.
errors.destination_amount_positive: Received amount must be greater than zero.
errors.destination_account_no_other_currency: The destination account doesn't have another currency for the exchange.
errors.exchange_rate_invalid: Exchange rate must be greater than zero.
errors.recurrence_failed: Transaction saved, but the recurring rule couldn't be created: {detail}
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

empty.title: No transactions yet
empty.description: Record your first income or expense on this account.
empty.no_accounts: You don't have any accounts yet. Create one to start recording transactions.

negative_balance_notice.title: The account balance would go negative
negative_balance_notice.body: Available in {currency} would drop to −{formatted}. You can still record it.

exchange.no_other_currency_hint: That account doesn't have another currency enabled. Choose an account with {currency} to exchange.

confirmations.delete_transfer_body: The transfer will be deleted and balances of both accounts will be updated.
confirmations.delete_transfer_inline: Delete this transfer? Balances of both accounts will be updated.
confirmations.delete_adjustment_inline: Delete this adjustment? This action cannot be undone.
confirmations.delete_movement_inline: Delete this transaction? This action cannot be undone.
confirmations.delete_installment_parent_inline: Delete this installment purchase? All of its installments will be removed. This is only possible if none of them have been paid.
confirmations.delete_adjustment_body: The adjustment will be deleted and the account balance will be updated.

list.global_empty_description: When you record income, expenses, transfers, or purchases, they'll appear here.

recurrences.title: Recurring
recurrences.description: Rules that generate pending transactions for you to confirm or skip.
recurrences.empty: No recurring rules yet. Toggle "Make recurring" when recording a transaction.

confirmations.delete: Delete this rule? Pending instances will be cancelled.

errors.duplicate: An identical recurring rule already exists.
errors.amount_invalid: Amount must be greater than zero.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

mapper_errors.missing_transfer_destination: The recurring transfer instance has no destination account.
mapper_errors.invalid_transfer_source: The source account of the transfer doesn't allow this type of movement.
mapper_errors.invalid_income_account: The selected account doesn't accept income.
mapper_errors.missing_category: A category is required for this transaction.
mapper_errors.missing_fx_rate: The day's FX rate is required to confirm this transaction.
mapper_errors.fx_rate_not_allowed: An FX rate is not applicable to this transaction.

pending.title: Pending recurring transactions
pending.amount_changes_rule: If it changes, the recurring rule will be updated too.

suggestion.title: Looks like this is recurring
suggestion.basis: Based on {count} transactions in the last 6 months.
